A '''tikulini''' or "mining worm" was a large, carnivorous [[Worm/Legends|worm]] native to [[Jazbina/Legends|Jazbina]] that inhabited the [[sun crystal]] mining tunnels. They had green blood. "Tikulini" meant "the death of a myriad knives." Their skin was strong enough to withstand a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] strike. They were believed to be extinct by [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], although at least one was known to have existed by then.

==Appearances==
*[[Vader's Quest 3|''Vader's Quest'' 3]] {{1st}}
